_comment: Active research state for Auto Audio Depth Estimation. One study = one structural hypothesis and its HPO/confirmation progression. When a study concludes, append a PASS/FAIL row to hypotheses.tsv, update archive.json, then open the next study. Adaptive-HPO ladder: structural-screen -> 3 -> 5 -> 7 -> 10, each extension justified by evidence. Never crown on <2-3 confirming draws (S10/E125 lesson).

active_study.general_hypothesis: If eval-time TTA helps because the base model is only approximately L/R-equivariant, then explicitly training for that equivariance could improve the base predictions (better held-out-scene generalisation) and tighten the TTA ensemble.
active_study.detailed_hypothesis: A stop-gradient teacher forward on the L/R-flipped input, penalising disagreement between the model's prediction and its own mirrored prediction (self-distillation for equivariance).
active_study.experiment_note: loss += 0.1 * masked|D - flip(model(swap_lr(x)).detach())|; one extra no_grad forward per training step (code staged at commit 25b7612).
open_risks: The extra teacher forward may push epoch time toward the ~555s budget ceiling -> verify epoch-1 time on resume; if it busts, reduce cost (e.g. apply consistency to a sub-batch) or FAIL the mechanism.
Equivariance training and TTA are partial substitutes: a more-equivariant base makes TTA add less on top; net effect must be measured, not assumed.
active_study.decision_rule: Structural screen first (1 run, resume E131). If catastrophically worse or budget-busting and unfixable -> FAIL. If plausible/competitive -> enter 3-run HPO on w_cons in {0.05,0.1,0.2}. Judge on the honest composite vs champion 3-draw mean 2.079; only crown with a clear >noise gain AND >=2 confirming draws.

backlog.idea: PROPOSAL-01: safely expose STFT/spatial-cue construction so representation research (multi-resolution STFT, early/late echo split, cross-channel coherence) is possible without touching the fixed split/target/metric.
Optional 4th-5th TTA draw to further tighten the champion mean if a future decision hinges on it.
Only if a NEW complementary mechanism appears; geometry axis is saturated at all cheap scales.
